purpose_context: The Spec Kitty design system monorepo has the infrastructure in place (packages, Storybook, CI) but only a single stub component. The Claude Design reference in tmp/ contains the actual token values, 30 brand font files, brand assets, and 8 component categories with full visual previews. This mission brings the reference into the live system: correct token values replace the bootstrap approximations, fonts are bundled in @spec-kitty/tokens for self-contained consumption, and each component category becomes a distributable HTML/JS primitive and Angular component with Storybook stories. The marketing-site JSX components are explicitly out of scope — this mission delivers atomic and molecular primitives only.
purpose_tldr: Migrate the Claude Design reference set into the monorepo: reconcile token values, bundle brand fonts, add brand assets, convert preview pages to Storybook docs, and implement the 8 component categories as distributable primitives.
